headline: How The EPAM Systems (EPAM) Story Is Shifting On AI Hopes And Client Headwinds
summary: EPAM Systems' fair value estimate in the current analyst model sits at US$191.18 per share, unchanged from the prior assessment, even as many firms are rethinking their price targets after the latest guidance. This stability comes while bullish and bearish voices debate how quickly EPAM's AI positioning can translate into growth and how much weight to give client specific headwinds. Read on to see what is driving this split in opinion and how you can track the evolving story around the...

headline: A Look At EPAM Systems (EPAM) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: EPAM Systems stock performance snapshot EPAM Systems (EPAM) shares recently closed at US$137.99, with the stock showing a 5% decline over the past month and a 37% decline over the past 3 months, alongside a 31% decline year to date. Over the past year, EPAM has delivered a total return of a 5% decline, while the 3-year and 5-year total returns stand at a 52% decline and a 68% decline, giving investors useful context on how the stock has behaved over different holding periods. See our latest...

headline: EPAM (EPAM): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Although the S&P 500 is down 2.3% over the past six months, EPAM’s stock price has fallen further to $138.56, losing shareholders 9.1% of their capital. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on EPAM Systems, Lowers Price Target to $213
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Bryan Bergin   maintains EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $220 to $213.
